title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
posterAlt: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003) movie poster
tmdbOverview: As armies mass for a final battle that will decide the fate of the world--and powerful, ancient forces of Light and Dark compete to determine the outcome--one member of the Fellowship of the Ring is revealed as the noble heir to the throne of the Kings of Men. Yet, the sole hope for triumph over evil lies with a brave hobbit, Frodo, who, accompanied by his loyal friend Sam and the hideous, wretched Gollum, ventures deep into the very dark heart of Mordor on his seemingly impossible quest to destroy the Ring of Power.​
synopsis: Released in 2003, The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King is a adventure, fantasy and action film from United States. It's highly rated, holding a strong 9.0 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
